CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment Against Deft
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
Plaintiff Wawanesa Insurance Company's Motion To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment Against Defendant is Granted. No opposition filed. (PRINCIPAL - $12,711.90 plus interest from Sept. 29, 2009 payable in installement plus court costs) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
